items.review:
Decent card game with good aethestics, but is extremely dupe heavy for some builds.

As for Mar 31, 2026, they have removed the ability to autoplay D-Tide, an important weekly mode that grants level u

拉完了，卡牌构筑毫无水平，纯自动战斗养成，还有超绝剧情迷宫战斗的“灵动”交互
你还致敬上杀戮尖塔了，这点倒是优点
结果一堆脚本鬼服号
搞得我也卖不出去

Deeply satisfying dopamine hits, pretty great F2P, fun card battler mechanics, steamrolling everything at the moment and I'm up to the 3rd Investigation. Digging the vibes and lovecraftian / anime cro
